message:
perf(PlasmaFx): apply sin/cos decomposition to cell-space render_with_palette (bd-3e1t.5.12)

Replace per-pixel sin/cos calls with geometry-time precomputation using
the identity sin(a+b) = sin(a)cos(b) + cos(a)sin(b). All trig is now
computed once per resize (in ensure_geometry) and once per frame (6
sin_cos pairs). Inner loops use only multiply-add — zero sin/cos per
pixel at any quality tier.

PlasmaScratch grows from 10 to 16 Vec<f64> fields (216→408 bytes) to
store sin/cos bases for all wave components. Quality-hoisted match
moves the quality dispatch outside the hot inner loop.

Benchmarks (120x40 Full): 97µs vs 500µs budget (5.2x headroom).
Throughput: ~49 Melem/s consistent across all sizes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
